reviews.comment:
Típica estación ypf de época.  Muy sencilla pero con lo necesario. Antologicos sandwiches preparados en el momento.  Ojo con el tamaño, son para compartir. Un extra es que tiene un campito para caminar, descansar y hasta comer en mesas. Parada obligada yendo por Ruta 3.

(Translated by Google)
A typical old-fashioned YPF station. Very simple but with everything you need. Legendary sandwiches made to order. Be aware of the size; they're meant to be shared. A bonus is that it has a small open area for walking, relaxing, and even eating at tables. A must-stop on Route 3.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aMFNuUlZUVTE2WWxOVWNtTldYM1JUVjJGRVpXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, productos de calidad. Abundante son esos sándwiches, son para compartir.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, quality products. The sandwiches are generous, perfect for sharing.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop on your trip and eat some amazing sandwiches

reviews.comment:
Para destacar en el buffet (cierran a las 19hs) hacen los mejores sandwichs de jamón crudo, son gigantes.

(Translated by Google)
To stand out at the buffet (they close at 7pm) they make the best prosciutto sandwiches, they are huge.

reviews.comment:
Estacion de cervicio ACA . con una muy buena cafetería,  con una plaza al lado para descansar despues de manejar x mucho tiempo

(Translated by Google)
ACA service station with a very good cafeteria and a plaza next door to rest after a long drive.

reviews.comment:
Impresionantes los sanguches, bien los baños y agua caliente gratis. Parada obligatoria.

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are amazing, the restrooms are nice, and there's free hot water. A must-stop.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención

Excellent service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cUk2Q2FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Ideal para parar a comer unos SamBuchitos. Sin deliciosos, el pan un 10! Si estas con muchísima hambre pedite uno para vos solo, sino son ideales para compartir y no quedarte con hambre. Muy linda la atencion y super fresco todo!

(Translated by Google)
Perfect for stopping for some SamBuchitos. They're delicious, the bread is a 10/10! If you're really hungry, order one for yourself, otherwise they're ideal for sharing so you don't go hungry. The service is great and everything is super fresh!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCVU9GbDNRVk5EVG5obWJIbEVkMWhrU0dZd1MzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Si pasas x ahí para si o si el sándwich de jamón crudo es increíble, ojo hay variedad, pero el de crudo mortal

(Translated by Google)
If you're passing by, you absolutely have to try the prosciutto sandwich; it's incredible. There are other varieties, but the prosciutto one is killer.

reviews.comment:
Una buena propuesta en la ruta para descanso.Tiene verde, mesas, hamacas. Buena atención y no cobran el agua caliente!! 👌

(Translated by Google)
A great option for a rest stop along the route. It has greenery, tables, and hammocks. Good service and hot water is free!! 👌

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para comprar sus inigualables sanwiches, por tamaño, cantidad y calidad de sus fiambres y precio. Super recomendables. Muy bien atendidos. Baños limpios.

A must-stop for their unbeatable sandwiches, thanks to their size, quantity, quality of cold cuts, and price. Highly recommended. Excellent service. Clean restrooms.

Very comfortable, a lovely park where, from what I saw, you can camp. Clean bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen parador sobre la R3. Baños aseados, mucha sombra y espacio abierto. Comimos 1 sandwiche de jamón y queso y es para compartir.  2 de febrero 2026

(Translated by Google)
Very nice rest stop on the R3. Clean restrooms, plenty of shade and open space. We had one ham and cheese sandwich, which is meant to be shared. February 2, 2026
